_description: Mutable state that the LLM may propose changes to in its structured ruling output. The engine validates and applies in-scope patches. Stored separately from hard state to enforce discipline.

korbar._schema_note: Allowed values: hostile, neutral, friendly. LLM may propose changes with a narrative justification. Engine caps transitions to one step per turn unless extraordinary circumstances.

_environmental_notes_schema.description: Narrative environmental changes proposed by the LLM (e.g., 'the webs are now slightly parted', 'Korbar has built a small lean-to from corks'). The engine accepts any note as long as it does not contradict hard state. These are used to give the LLM continuity between turns.

_turn_history_schema.description: Structured log of each completed turn. Appended by engine after resolution. Each entry contains the player action, engine result, and applied state changes.
